args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%spa%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%massage%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%spa%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%' OR LOWER(description) LIKE '%spa%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%massage%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%spa%';
